title: 2-Nonenal
synonyms: trans-2-Nonenal (contains trans-2-Nonenal diethyl acetal) (ca. 10% in Ethanol, ca. 0.57 mol/L)

why_it_matters.text: A cucumber-and-paper smell familiar from stale beer and the scent of old books.
